title: Cook in Skyland
body:
![CiS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f052a6fe860a4890843006a7c7b0782defff50c.png)

Only Chinese version now 

Unless you delete the mod Just Enough Character and i18n and ignore the description of quest 

English version will be updated when finishing testing 

 
### Does industrial mining make you feel bored?
### 
### Come and try this!
### 
### 'Create' a production line for 'Farmers'Delight' on a sky-land!
### 
### Our goal is!
### 
### Make a cake!
### 
### And have a fantastic party!
###  

Ex Nihilo will let you live in sky land 

Create is the key of your factory 

Farmers’Delight supports many food for you to explore and make 

 

This modpack are now in test and will update soon 

If you have any issues, please comment below

PS:My English is poor, please use simple words :)

![Wabbanode](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f53de8f390131e835ea39ca7751342cd7f0264b8_0.webp)
You can play with your friends in server now. Wabbanode.com now Provide server rental services. [Click here](https://www.wabbanode.com/affiliate/cookinskyland) to get more infomation.
Use CHINESELULIL as code to get 25% discount.
